title: horvatia andicola
intro: Horvatia andicola is a type of flowering plant native to the Andes mountains. It belongs to the family Asteraceae and is also known as the 'Andean Horvatia'. The medicinal properties of Horvatia andicola include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant are still being researched, but it is believed to have applications in treating various conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
